source_transcript: Flag heavy drinkers—more than 5 drinks weekly or alcohol-use disorder codes—and active biliary disease: cholecystitis, choledocholithiasis, cholangitis. Don't auto-exclude them. Review required, lower priority.

effect.label: Potential pancreatitis risk (alcohol/biliary disease)
effect.explanation: Patient has risk factors for GLP-1-related pancreatitis. Review required; do not auto-exclude.
